tasks.label: Run Current Java File
tasks.command: chcp 65001; Remove-Item -LiteralPath "${fileDirname}\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.class" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; javac -encoding UTF-8 "${file}"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { java "-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8" -cp "${fileDirname}" "${fileBasenameNoExtension}" }
